steps.title: Shipping Information
steps.description: Enter your delivery address and choose a shipping method.

validation.postal_required: Please enter a valid postal code.
validation.phone_required: A phone number is required for delivery.

steps.title: Payment Details
steps.description: Choose your payment method and enter your details.

bank_transfer.description: Pay directly from your bank account. Processing may take 1-2 business days.

validation.card_invalid: Please enter a valid card number.
validation.expiry_invalid: Please enter a valid expiration date.
validation.cvv_invalid: Please enter the 3-digit security code from the back of your card.

steps.title: Review and Confirm

labels.terms_agreement: By placing your order, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

steps.title: Order Confirmed!
